hero.title: Seedance 2.0
hero.subtitle: AI Video Generator
hero.description: Text to Video · Image to Video · Professional 1080p Output · No Filming, No Editing Software Required

gallery.title: Seedance 2.0 AI Video Generator Gallery
gallery.description: Real videos made with Seedance 2.0 — text to video, image to video, video editing, and more. Hover any clip to see the results.

textToVideo.label: Text to Video
textToVideo.title: Text to Video AI
textToVideo.desc: Type a scene, get a video. Turn your words into 1080p footage with synchronized audio. No filming required.
textToVideo.prompt: A father and his young son stand together on a circular stone platform before a massive ancient portal gateway. The portal glows with swirling bright blue cosmic energy. Cinematic wide shot, dramatic blue lighting, sci-fi fantasy atmosphere.

imageToVideo.label: Image to Video
imageToVideo.title: Image to Video AI
imageToVideo.desc: Drop in a photo, Seedance 2.0 does the rest. Animate any still image with natural motion and synchronized sound.
imageToVideo.prompt: The camera follows a man in black sprinting through the streets. A crowd chases behind him. Chaotic shouts echo from the crowd.

reference.label: Reference to Video
reference.title: Reference to Video AI
reference.desc: Give Seedance 2.0 your reference images or clips and it builds new video around them. AI video generation with style and motion you actually control.
reference.prompt: Use the female star from @Image1 as the main subject, reference the camera movements from @Video1. The star's dance moves also reference the woman's dance, performing energetically on stage.

extension.label: Video Extension
extension.title: AI Video Extension
extension.desc: Need a longer clip? Seedance 2.0 picks up where your footage ends and keeps the look consistent.
extension.prompt: Extend 15 seconds. A donkey rides a motorcycle through a surreal advertisement world, referencing the character design from the provided images.

editing.label: Video Editing
editing.title: AI Video Editing
editing.desc: Change styles, swap elements, or adjust existing clips. Seedance 2.0 re-renders your video while keeping the original structure.
editing.prompt: Change the scene to cyberpunk style with neon lighting and futuristic city background. Keep characters and actions the same.

whoItsFor.title: Made for Every Creator
whoItsFor.description: Animation, film, manga series, YouTube content, product demos. Seedance 2.0 is your AI video generator.

animators.label: Animators & Artists
animators.title: Animate Your Art
animators.desc: Animate characters, create manga series, and produce cartoon episodes with Seedance 2.0.

characterAnimation.title: Character Animation
characterAnimation.desc: Bring illustrated characters to life. Upload your artwork and Seedance 2.0 handles motion, expressions, and lip sync.

mangaVideos.title: Manga & Comic Videos
mangaVideos.desc: Turn static manga panels into animated episodes with Seedance 2.0. Consistent characters across every scene.

cartoonSeries.title: Cartoon Series
cartoonSeries.desc: Produce multi-episode animated series. Same characters, same style, different stories.

motionGraphics.title: Motion Graphics
motionGraphics.desc: Animated logos, title sequences, and visual effects. No After Effects required.

filmmakers.label: Filmmakers
filmmakers.title: Cinematic AI Video
filmmakers.desc: Create cinematic sequences, test shots, and produce scenes without a crew or equipment.

scenePreviz.title: Scene Previz
scenePreviz.desc: Visualize scenes before shooting. Test camera angles, lighting, and compositions in seconds.

bRoll.title: B-Roll Generation
bRoll.desc: Generate supplemental footage from text descriptions. Perfect for documentaries and explainers.

multiShot.title: Multi-Shot Sequences
multiShot.desc: Consistent characters and style across scenes. Tell longer stories without drift.

postProduction.title: Post-Production
postProduction.desc: AI video editing to swap elements, change styles, or extend existing footage.

creators.label: Content Creators
creators.title: Content at Scale
creators.desc: Produce YouTube videos, TikTok content, and social media clips faster than ever before.

socialClips.title: Social Clips
socialClips.desc: Vertical, square, or horizontal — every format for every platform. One tool, all outputs.

beatSync.title: Beat Sync Videos
beatSync.desc: Feed images and a rhythm track. AI cuts and transitions on beat, automatically.

thumbnails.title: Thumbnails & Hooks
thumbnails.desc: Generate eye-catching opening sequences and thumbnails with a single prompt.

seriesProduction.title: Series Production
seriesProduction.desc: Maintain consistent branding across hundreds of clips without manual effort.

marketers.label: Marketers & Teams
marketers.title: Marketing at Speed
marketers.desc: Create product demos, ads, and explainer videos without a video production budget.

productDemos.title: Product Demos
productDemos.desc: Show your product in action with AI-generated demonstration videos.

adCreatives.title: Ad Creatives
adCreatives.desc: Generate multiple ad variations from a single brief. Test what converts.

explainerVideos.title: Explainer Videos
explainerVideos.desc: Turn complex concepts into clear animated explanations in minutes.

brandContent.title: Brand Content
brandContent.desc: Consistent visual style across all video content. No filmmaker required.

howItWorks.title: From Idea to Video with Seedance 2.0
howItWorks.description: Describe your video, let Seedance 2.0 do the work, download your result. No editing skills needed.

describe.title: Describe Your Scene
describe.desc: Write what you want to see. A product demo with voiceover, or a cinematic landscape with ambient music. Add reference images for better results.

generate.title: Generate Your Video
generate.desc: Seedance 2.0 processes your input and creates video, audio, and transitions simultaneously. Most clips are ready in under 60 seconds.

download.title: Download and Use
download.desc: Your video is ready in 1080p. Download, share to social platforms, or edit further. Not happy? Regenerate with adjusted prompts.

wechat.title: WeChat Support
wechat.desc: Add us on WeChat for instant help

phone.desc: Call during business hours for instant support

items.a: We typically respond to emails within 24 hours. For urgent issues, please contact us via WeChat.
We provide support in both Chinese and English.

items.q: How do I report a technical issue?
items.a: Please email 1042808428@qq.com with a detailed description and screenshots of the issue.

apiDocsPage.title: API Documentation
apiDocsPage.subtitle: Complete reference for Seedance 2.0 API integration

overview.intro: The Seedance 2.0 API allows you to generate high-quality AI videos programmatically. Our REST API is designed to be simple, powerful, and developer-friendly.

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.intro: All API requests require authentication using an API key. Include your API key in the Authorization header of each request.
steps: Sign up for a Seedance account
Copy and securely store your key

security.title: Security Best Practices
items: Never expose your API key in client-side code
Use environment variables to store keys
Use different keys for different environments

generate.title: Generate Video
generate.desc: Create a new video from a text prompt or image.

checkStatus.title: Check Video Status
checkStatus.desc: Check the status of a video generation task.

items.q: What makes Seedance 2.0 different from other AI video generators?
items.a: Native audio. Tools like Runway and Sora generate silent video. Seedance 2.0 creates synchronized dialogue, sound effects, and music in one step. It also supports multi-shot storytelling with character consistency across scenes.

items.q: How long does Seedance 2.0 take to generate a video?
items.a: Most videos are ready in 30 to 60 seconds. Video, audio, and transitions are processed simultaneously, so there is no separate audio syncing step.
1080p. Sharp enough for YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and professional presentations.

items.q: Can I use images as input for Seedance 2.0?
items.a: Yes. Seedance 2.0 supports both text-to-video and image-to-video. You can upload up to 12 references per project — images, video clips, and audio to guide the output.
Yes. Start for free, no credit card required. The free tier includes standard quality output. Upgrade for 1080p resolution, longer videos, and priority generation.

items.q: Do characters stay consistent in Seedance 2.0 videos?
items.a: Yes. Same face, clothing, and style across every frame and scene. No character drift, even in multi-shot sequences.

items.q: What output formats does Seedance 2.0 support?
items.a: MP4 and WebM. Compatible with all major platforms and editing software.

items.q: Who owns the videos I create with Seedance 2.0?
items.a: You do. Full commercial rights, no attribution required.
